test_cases.prompt: Evaluate this healthcare diagnostic tool context.
test_cases.context: Medical diagnostic tools leverage machine learning models to identify anomalies. In clinical trials, they demonstrate high specificity and sensitivity.

test_cases.prompt: Analyze quantitative modeling for stock variance.
test_cases.context: Quantitative modeling of stock variance relies on historical volatility. The Sharpe ratio calculates risk-adjusted return.
The non-disclosure agreement binds both parties to maintain confidentiality regarding proprietary IP. Violation triggers liquidated damages.

test_cases.prompt: What protocol is used for API requests?
test_cases.context: Technical documentation: All client requests must use HTTPS. Payloads must be in JSON format.
